room.caption: [G5-1J] So this map could have been a BIT more elaborate, but eh... I've got no excuse. Just take the item and go, never come back here.

instance.creationCode:
sprite_index=sChargePickup image_speed=0.33 soundToPlay=global.snd_MetItemGet stringToShow="You can now use the Charge Beam!" fadingTime=60 boxSize=1
if global.gameProgress>=2750 instance_destroy()
